title: Explain why shared mode is incompatible with distributed tests
prompt: Write `docs/shared_mode_distributed.md` explaining why shared mode is NOT compatible with distributed/multi-node tests. Must explain: (1) shared mode is scoped to a single BEAM node's sandbox GenServer, (2) a test spanning multiple nodes (via `:slave.start_link` or `Cluster` etc.) cannot propagate the sandbox allowance across node boundaries, (3) the fix is to use `allow/3` with the explicit `rpc` call to the other node, OR to run each node in its own sandbox, OR to give up on sandbox and use a real DB.
tier_rationale: Niche but important explanation of shared-mode scoping.
